---
title: "Question 1"
---

In this question we generate a random sample from an exponential distribution with a mean of 1 using a `foreach` loop repeated a 100 times.

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
library(foreach)
```

```{r}
mean_variance <- function(x){
  c(mean(x), var(x))
}

set.seed(2025)
results <- foreach(i = 1:100, .combine = rbind) %do% {
  samples <- rexp(5000, rate = 1)
  mean_variance(samples)  # Fixed variable name
}

# Add column names for clarity
colnames(results) <- c("Mean", "Variance")
head(results)

# Check results
cat("Average of means:", mean(results[,1]), "(true mean = 1)\n")
cat("Average of variances:", mean(results[,2]), "(true variance = 1)\n")
```
